sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n228" key="a)g" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγ</orth>, apoc. form of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀνά</foreign> before <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">κ</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">γ</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">χ</itype>, <sense id="n228.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀνά</ref> </xr> init.</sense> </entryFree>
